en: Oh, sorry, is it okay if we swear in front of you?
ko: 아, 미안, 너 앞에서 욕해도 괜찮아?

en: Of course you effing can. I've heard it all.
Anyway, I'm here if you guys have questions.
Hey, hon, hope your study group's going okay. I brought your lunch. Heather! Get out of here, Heather! Okay!
ko: 이봐, 자기야, 스터디 그룹 잘 되고 있길 바래. 점심 가져왔어. 헤더! 나가! 알겠어!

en: I don't need that! I have a meal plan, Heather! Okay, hon. Heather, go! Don't embarrass me, Heather! You can't ask me that! What's in it? A Cressible!
ko: 그거 필요 없어! 나 식단이 있어, 헤더! 알겠어, 자기야. 헤더, 가! 나를 창피하게 하지 마, 헤더! 그걸 물어볼 수 없어! 뭐가 들어있어? 크레서블이야!

en: Paper strawberry! Both! Leave it! Okay!
ko: 종이 딸기! 둘 다! 놔둬! 알겠어!

en: So, where are we going for spring break?
Simon, are you okay? Yeah, defo.
If we do Miami, we can get there by train.
ko: 마이애미로 가면 기차로 갈 수 있어.

en: Um, was that your mom? What?
No, that'd be weird. I'm just like you guys.
ko: 아니, 그건 이상해. 나도 너희랑 같아.

en: I live in the dorms, I have a roommate,
I shower in my shoes, my balls are happening.
ko: 신발 신고 샤워하고, 내 일이 벌어지고 있어.

en: Oh, um, wait, who's your roommate?
ko: 아, 음, 잠깐, 너의 룸메이트는 누구야?

en: This random older woman they paired me with.
ko: 나랑 짝지어진 랜덤한 나이 많은 여자야.
